notes: Phase 3 tests the action-producing skills. Each test verifies the artifacts the skill produces.

evals.name: tdd-slice1-tiptap-editor
evals.input: Run tdd-loop on Slice 1 of the collab-editor spec (single-user Tiptap editor renders and saves).

assertions.name: wrote_test_before_code
assertions.check: Output documents RED phase before GREEN phase explicitly

assertions.name: test_file_exists
assertions.check: A test file is produced (e.g., slice-01-editor.spec.ts)

assertions.name: test_was_observed_failing
assertions.check: Output shows the test failure output explicitly before implementation

assertions.name: implementation_files_produced
assertions.check: At least one implementation file produced (Editor.tsx, page.tsx, etc.)

assertions.name: minimality_discipline
assertions.check: Output explicitly lists what was NOT added in this slice (deferred to later slices)

assertions.name: deep_modules_invoked
assertions.check: REFACTOR phase shows deep-modules check ran (even if no changes)

assertions.name: commit_message_present
assertions.check: Output includes commit message with what's verified + what's NOT in this slice

assertions.name: check_in_phase_present
assertions.check: Output has Phase 5 check-in (end-to-end value, open questions, next slice)

evals.name: deepen-auth-subsystem
evals.input: Run deep-modules on a hypothetical auth subsystem with pass-throughs and a hypothetical seam.

assertions.name: read_domain_context
assertions.check: Output references GLOSSARY.md or domain glossary

assertions.name: checked_adrs
assertions.check: Output references at least one existing ADR

assertions.name: applied_deletion_test
assertions.check: Each candidate has 'Deletion-test result' field

assertions.name: uses_ousterhout_vocabulary
assertions.check: References at least 2 of: deep, shallow, pass-through, hypothetical seam, information leakage

assertions.name: surfaced_2plus_candidates
assertions.check: At least 2 candidates surfaced

assertions.name: flagged_adr_conflicts
assertions.check: Any ADR conflicts marked explicitly

assertions.name: asks_user_to_pick
assertions.check: Output ends with 'which to explore' or similar — does NOT propose implementation

assertions.name: uses_domain_vocabulary
assertions.check: Uses GLOSSARY.md vocabulary (e.g., User/Session/Credential, not Account/Auth)

evals.name: dispatch-afk-group
evals.input: Run parallel-dev on the AFK Group A (Slices 5 + 7) from the collab-editor spec.

assertions.name: independence_verification_table
assertions.check: Output has explicit independence verification table with 5 checks

assertions.name: subagent_specs_complete
assertions.check: Each subagent has Task, Input, Output, Constraints, Verification

assertions.name: captures_timing
assertions.check: Results table includes duration and tokens per subagent

assertions.name: computes_parallelism_gain
assertions.check: Output computes speedup vs sequential

assertions.name: handles_close_calls
assertions.check: If independence check found anything, the mitigation is documented

assertions.name: verification_of_aggregate
assertions.check: Output verifies tests pass after merge

assertions.name: captures_lessons
assertions.check: Output includes Lessons section for future calibration

evals.name: slice-usage-based-billing
evals.input: Decompose 'usage-based SaaS billing with Stripe' into vertical slices.

assertions.name: produces_4_to_10_slices
assertions.check: 4-10 slices produced

assertions.name: first_slice_is_narrowest_end_to_end
assertions.check: Slice 1 is end-to-end (single event through full stack), not 'set up database'

assertions.name: all_slices_labeled
assertions.check: Every slice has HITL or AFK label

assertions.name: default_afk_bias
assertions.check: Most slices (>60%) are AFK, not HITL

assertions.name: hitl_has_reason
assertions.check: Any HITL slices have explicit reasoning in parentheses

assertions.name: dependency_dag_present
assertions.check: Output has dependency DAG diagram

assertions.name: parallelization_identified
assertions.check: Output identifies which slices can run in parallel

assertions.name: quality_checklist_filled
assertions.check: Slice quality checklist or equivalent verification present

assertions.name: no_horizontal_slices
assertions.check: No slice titled 'database layer', 'API only', 'frontend only', etc.
